Focus areas

Specializations oriented to current technology needs with solid engineering fundamentals.

Area

Data analytics

Cloud solutions for large-scale information management with an applied Big Data approach.

Focus Specialization
Open details
Area

Human-computer interaction

Prototype design and control through vision, voice, and gestures using hardware and software.

Focus Specialization
Open details
Area

Wireless technologies

Remote device integration with Wi-Fi, Bluetooth, RFID, and other communication technologies.

Focus Specialization
Open details
Area

IT auditing and legislation

Application of legal frameworks in IT to protect assets and strengthen institutional compliance.

Focus Specialization
Open details

Additional specialization lines

Complementary fields to broaden technical judgement across architecture, business, and operations.

Specialization

Emerging technologies

Implementation of advanced scenarios with cloud computing and production-ready environments.

Cloud + Production

Specialization

Distributed databases

Distributed architecture design and query optimization for scalable systems.

SQL + Distributed

Specialization

E-business

Product + Digital

Specialization

Intelligent systems

Integration of software, networking, and automation to solve real operational problems.
